_comment: Master catalog of movie metadata, keyed by TMDB id. Populated during ranking sessions from TMDB. The single entry below is a sample/template — replace it with real data.

27205.title: Inception
27205.overview: Cobb, a skilled thief who commits corporate espionage by infiltrating the subconscious of his targets, is offered a chance to regain his old life as payment for a task considered to be impossible: 'inception', the implantation of another person's idea into a target's subconscious.
